title: Lots of swords
description: A mod that adds lots of swors
body:
This mod is going to add more swords and I will add more later on.
There are only two swords for now but there will be more to come.

Swords:
Nether sword: lights Enitiys on fire when hit with
Obsidian sword: A heavy sword that does more damge then a normal sword

crafting items:
Netherrack plate: Used to craft nether sword
